column1: # Splash port — Phase 5 tier-1 PR-time similarity floors.
# Match policy: pdf_basename matches the PDF file basename (e.g. GeoTopo.pdf).
# Hard rule (project memory): similarity_percent must monotonically rise. A
# drop below the floor FAILS the test; raising the floor requires running
# with SPLASH_TIER1_SNAPSHOT=1 in a follow-up "floor++" commit per
# Initial values are conservative: 80.0% across most pages, 90.0% for the
# 8 watch-set pages (which are already pinned at exact ≥98% in watchset.tsv).
# Run `SPLASH_TIER1_SNAPSHOT=1 make splash-corpus-tier1` to promote to the
# real measured values once Phase 5 lands.
